bignews.title: Animal Kingdom's Food Scene Takes Center Stage
bignews.body: Disney's Animal Kingdom has become one of the most exciting dining destinations at Walt Disney World Resort. Chefs are showcasing bold flavors and global inspiration with dishes like Pulled Pork Cheese Arepas at The Smiling Crocodile, Ocean Moon Bowls at Satu'li Canteen, and the viral Cookie Dough Brownie Ice Cream Sandwich. From breakfast at Kusafiri Coffee Shop to adventurous plates at Harambe Market, the park rewards curious eaters exploring its culinary creativity.

bignews.title: Tiffins Restaurant Celebrates 10th Anniversary
bignews.body: Tiffins Restaurant and Nomad Lounge mark their 10th anniversary this year at Disney's Animal Kingdom. The dining experience invites guests on a culinary journey inspired by global travel, embodying the spirit of discovery that defines the park's food story. The restaurant continues to showcase world-class culinary storytelling through dishes drawn from chefs' backgrounds, cultures, and travels.

spotlight.title: Plan Your Own Food Expedition
spotlight.body: Disney's Animal Kingdom now offers one of the most diverse dining experiences at Walt Disney World Resort. Guests can start their day with Coconut-flavored Iced Coffee at Kusafiri, fuel up with a Smokehouse Chicken Salad at Flame Tree Barbecue, or explore adventurous options like the Harissa Chicken Wrap at Harambe Market. Plant-based guests will find options like the Plant-based Picadillo Bowl featuring Impossible beef. The park rewards those who plan their day around discovering unexpected flavors.
